northStar: DoctorMX will be the leading AI healthcare platform in Mexico, bridging the healthcare accessibility gap through intelligent diagnostic assistance, telemedicine integration, and seamless connections to local healthcare providers.
codingRules: Component-First Design: Build self-contained, reusable components with clear interfaces
Feature-Based Organization: Code organized by domain features, not technical concerns
Clean Separation: UI, business logic, and data access clearly separated
TypeScript Everywhere: Use strong typing for all code to prevent runtime errors
Testing First: Write tests before implementing features
Accessibility Built-in: All components meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards

phases.name: MVP Core Foundation
phases.description: Establish a functional patient-focused application with basic AI diagnosis capabilities

tasks.title: Fix UI/UX Rendering Issues
tasks.description: Resolve React error #31 and other rendering issues to stabilize the application
tasks.details:
1. Identify and fix component export issues in the codebase
2. Resolve chat interface animation and shadow issues
3. Fix image analysis component rendering
4. Ensure responsive design works on all target devices
5. Update styling to match brand guidelines
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Create UI smoke tests to verify components render correctly
2. Test on multiple screen sizes and devices
3. Verify animations and transitions are smooth and purposeful
4. Confirm all accessibility requirements are met

subtasks.title: Fix Component Export Issues
subtasks.description: Resolve React error #31 by fixing improper component exports in SkeletonLoader.tsx and icon files

subtasks.title: Stabilize Chat Interface
subtasks.description: Fix animations, shadows, and vibration issues in the chat interface to improve user experience

subtasks.title: Fix Image Analysis Component
subtasks.description: Ensure image analysis component properly validates input and displays results correctly

subtasks.title: Implement Responsive Design Fixes
subtasks.description: Address responsive design issues on mobile and tablet devices

tasks.title: Implement Real AI Integration
tasks.description: Replace mock AI service with real OpenAI integration
tasks.details:
1. Create OpenAI API client with proper error handling
2. Implement medical prompt engineering for accurate results
3. Add image analysis with GPT-4 Vision capabilities
4. Implement proper validation and filtering of non-medical content
5. Add fallback mechanism for when API is unavailable
6. Ensure secure handling of sensitive medical data
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test API response handling including error cases
2. Verify prompt effectiveness with medical test cases
3. Test image validation with medical and non-medical images
4. Measure response times and implement appropriate loading indicators

subtasks.title: Create OpenAI API Client
subtasks.description: Develop a robust OpenAI API client with proper error handling and retry logic

subtasks.title: Implement Medical Prompt Engineering
subtasks.description: Develop effective prompts for medical diagnosis that maximize accuracy

subtasks.title: Add GPT-4 Vision Integration
subtasks.description: Implement image analysis using GPT-4 Vision API with non-medical image filtering

subtasks.title: Create Fallback Mechanisms
subtasks.description: Implement fallback strategies for when the API is unavailable or returns errors

tasks.title: Develop Core Patient Experience
tasks.description: Create key patient-facing features including medical history collection and symptom reporting
tasks.details:
1. Design and implement user onboarding flow
2. Create medical history collection forms
3. Develop symptom reporting interface with guided questions
4. Implement secure user authentication
5. Design history viewing and management interface
6. Create user profile management
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Conduct usability testing with representative users
2. Verify form validation and error handling
3. Test authentication flows including account recovery
4. Validate data persistence and retrieval

subtasks.title: Design Onboarding Flow
subtasks.description: Create intuitive onboarding experience for new users

subtasks.title: Implement Medical History Collection
subtasks.description: Develop forms for collecting relevant medical history from patients

subtasks.title: Create Symptom Reporting Interface
subtasks.description: Build guided symptom reporting interface with dynamic follow-up questions

subtasks.title: Implement User Authentication
subtasks.description: Set up secure authentication with Supabase including account recovery

tasks.title: Create Static Provider Directory
tasks.description: Develop a basic provider directory to support referrals from AI diagnostics
tasks.details:
1. Design provider data model
2. Create static provider database with Mexican healthcare providers
3. Implement search and filtering functionality
4. Design provider profile pages
5. Add specialty mapping to AI recommendations
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify search functionality with various queries
2. Test filter combinations
3. Validate provider profile information display
4. Test integration with AI recommendation engine

subtasks.title: Design Provider Data Model
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive data model for healthcare providers

subtasks.title: Implement Provider Search
subtasks.description: Develop search functionality with filters for specialty, location, and availability

subtasks.title: Create Provider Profiles
subtasks.description: Design and implement provider profile pages with relevant information

subtasks.title: Integrate with AI Recommendations
subtasks.description: Connect AI diagnosis to appropriate provider recommendations

2. Implement more sophisticated triage logic
